//: Claude Code / generic MCP `mcpServers` snippet for crenel. Copy the entry you want into your client's MCP config (e.g. ~/.claude.json or a project .mcp.json). Adjust the crenel path, --config, or -admin-url/-zone to your edge. No credentials are baked in — crenel reads the same config as the CLI.

crenel.//: READ-ONLY: status/audit/drift. Read-only by construction — safe to grant without an approval gate.

crenel-rw.//: READ + GATED WRITE: adds crenel_plan + crenel_apply (two-phase). Approve crenel_apply through your client's tool-approval flow; crenel_plan is read-only and safe to auto-approve.

crenel-env.//: No settings file — drive the edge from flags/env instead.
